description: A sleek black-and-white designed quote card in portrait format. The background is a high-contrast monochrome photograph of Vice President JD Vance standing in a suit (white shirt, dark tie, US flag lapel pin), buttoning his jacket, looking directly at the camera with a serious expression, columns softly blurred behind him; a sliver of a second man in a suit appears at the far right edge. The bottom half carries a pull-quote introduced by a large gray decorative opening quotation mark. The first sentence is highlighted with a green marker bar: 'On Monday, the Trump administration announced Project Vault, America's first domestic critical minerals stockpile...' Following in white text: 'We intend to build an ironclad network of new industrial supply chains to span the entire nation. We're going to create good-paying jobs, skilled jobs for the American labor force, and those people, those skilled workers, are going to be securing a new era of prosperity for American families.' Attribution in bold: 'Vice President JD Vance', with italic sub-line 'Critical Minerals Ministerial, February 4th, 2026'. Polished, prestige, official styling. Propaganda technique: leader-quote card promoting an economic-nationalist policy (Project Vault) and job creation. Target audience: general public and economic-policy followers.
notable_text: On Monday, the Trump administration announced Project Vault, America's first domestic critical minerals stockpile... securing a new era of prosperity for American families. — Vice President JD Vance, Critical Minerals Ministerial, February 4th, 2026
